nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the way of his father and in his sin which he made Israel sin.

esv.text: He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord  and walked in the way of his father, and in his sin which he made Israel to sin.

cnv.text: 拿答行耶和華看為惡的事，跟隨他父親的路，犯他父親使以色列人陷在罪中的那罪。

ccb.text: 拿答像他父亲一样作恶多端，行耶和华视为恶的事，使以色列人陷入罪中。
